svg.text: Wall: 4mm solid all sides. Interior: 140W x 122D x 72H mm
2. Wall thickness 4mm solid all sides (no ribs).
3. Bottom slide rails: 2x parallel, 2mm tall x 3mm wide,
4. Interior tray ledges: 2mm wide shelves at Z=4 on
5. Rear wall: 4x JG fitting pockets, ⌀13mm bore,
6. Rear wall: release plate cavity 59W x 47H x 6D mm.
7. Rear wall: 2x guide pin holes ⌀3mm, 10mm deep.
8. Front wall: pivot hole ⌀5mm, push rod hole ⌀5.5mm,
9. 5mm x 45° chamfer on 4 vertical leading edges.
10. Top face: pogo PCB pocket 15W x 30L x 1.5D mm.
11. 4x M3 heat-set inserts on interior ledges for tray.
